name: Evergreen Golf Club
about: Evergreen Golf Club Tacoma is a 13,000-square-foot indoor golf facility offering year-round training with state-of-the-art technology. The club features Trackman simulators using Doppler radar and camera technology, a short game complex with a chipping green, 7 hole locations, 5 chipping bays, and a sand bunker, as well as a PuttView putting green for performance tracking. Membership options include various simulator hour packages, and the venue hosts events, lessons, and programs for all skill levels, including junior and ladies-specific offerings.
why_golfers_like_it: Top-of-the-line Trackman technology for accurate data and immersive course experience
Comprehensive short game complex with realistic chipping and putting areas
Variety of membership options to suit different usage needs and skill levels
Professional instruction available in group or one-on-one settings
Host of amenities including events, ladies programs, and junior golf leagues

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned, BYOB policy not specified
No on-site bar mentioned, BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator brand using Doppler radar and camera technology
Secondary simulator brand using camera technology

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own clubs to use the simulators and practice facilities.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The BYOB policy is not explicitly mentioned on the website, so it's recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the typical time required to play 18 holes in the simulators.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the club offers junior golf programs including Evergreen Elite and PGA Junior League, making it kid-friendly.
